name: Open Face Sardine Sandwiches with Quick Aioli
recipeIngredient: 2 Cans sardines packed in water, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the garlic and mince until puréed.
2. Stir the purée into the mayonnaise.
3. Cut the baguette into 4 pieces and split each piece lengthwise.
4. Spread each piece lengthwise with the aioli, dividing evenly.
5. Trim, wash, and dry the watercress and divide between the 8 pieces of bread.
6. Top each bread piece with sardines.
7. Makes 4 servings.
